steps.assistant_text: 36-insn function-pointer dispatch + error-packet send. 3-fragment cross-file merge: func_800065BC (kernel_015 -O1, head 13 insns) + func_800065F0 (kernel_016 -O2, body 23 insns; itself absorbed func_80006640 epilogue earlier). Step 1: MOVE INCLUDE_ASM(800065F0) from kernel_016 to kernel_015 (this tick). Step 2/3: same-file merge as single C body at -O1. Key match tricks: (1) typed ErrPkt struct (instead of char buf[12]) gives IDO direct-sp-offset stores instead of indirect via t-reg; (2) write order pkt.idx then pkt.result — IDO reorders so idx-write lands in jal delay slot. Cross-file unblock per feedback_cross_file_fragment_unblock_via_move_then_merge.md.
